title: Road Signs
description: Recognize signs by shape, color, and meaning.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that means STOP.

feedback.correct: That's the stop sign — eight sides and red. Come to a full stop.
feedback.yield: That's a yield sign. The stop sign is the red one with eight sides. Try again.
feedback.speed: That's a speed limit sign. The stop sign is the red eight-sided one. Try again.
feedback.default: The stop sign is red with eight sides. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that means YIELD (let others go first).

feedback.correct: Right — the upside-down red and white triangle means yield: let others go, then go when clear.
feedback.dne: That one means Do Not Enter. The yield sign is the triangle pointing down. Try again.
feedback.stop: That's a stop sign. Yield is the triangle pointing down. Try again.
feedback.default: Yield is the downward red-and-white triangle. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that means DO NOT ENTER.

feedback.correct: Yes — the red circle with a white bar means do not enter. Don't drive in.
feedback.nou: That means No U-Turn. Do Not Enter is the red circle with a white bar. Try again.
feedback.one: That's a One Way sign. Do Not Enter is the red circle with a white bar. Try again.
feedback.default: Do Not Enter is the red circle with a white bar. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Warning signs are yellow diamonds. Tap the warning sign.

feedback.correct: Yes! Yellow diamond signs warn you about what's ahead — here, a curve.
feedback.stop: That's a stop sign (a regulatory sign). Warning signs are yellow diamonds. Try again.
feedback.speed: That's a speed limit sign. Warning signs are the yellow diamonds. Try again.
feedback.default: Warning signs are yellow and diamond-shaped. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that warns of a railroad crossing.

feedback.correct: Yes — the round yellow sign with the X and two R's means a railroad crossing is ahead.
feedback.school: That's a school sign. The railroad sign is round and yellow with an X. Try again.
feedback.curve: That warns of a curve. The railroad sign is round and yellow with an X. Try again.
feedback.default: The railroad sign is round, yellow, with an X and two R's. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that warns people may be crossing.

feedback.correct: Yes — the yellow diamond with a person means watch for people crossing.
feedback.merge: That one means a lane is merging. The pedestrian sign shows a person walking. Try again.
feedback.work: That's a road-work sign. The pedestrian sign shows a person walking. Try again.
feedback.default: Look for the yellow sign with a walking person. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that means you are near a school.

feedback.correct: Yes — the green five-sided sign with children means a school zone. Slow down and watch for kids.
feedback.work: That's an orange road-work sign. The school sign is the five-sided green one. Try again.
feedback.yield: That's a yield sign. The school sign is the five-sided green one with children. Try again.
feedback.default: The school sign has five sides and shows children. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Orange signs mean road work. Tap the road-work sign.

feedback.correct: Yes — orange means a work zone. Slow down and watch for workers.
feedback.curve: That yellow sign warns of a curve. Road-work signs are orange. Try again.
feedback.ped: That's a pedestrian sign. Road-work signs are orange. Try again.
feedback.default: Road-work signs are orange. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that means NO LEFT TURN.

feedback.correct: Yes — the left arrow with a red slash means you can't turn left here.
feedback.nou: That means No U-Turn. No Left Turn shows a left arrow with a slash. Try again.
feedback.one: That's a One Way sign. No Left Turn shows a left arrow with a slash. Try again.
feedback.default: Look for the left arrow crossed out. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the sign that shows the speed limit.

feedback.correct: Yes — the white sign with a number is the speed limit. Don't drive faster than that.
feedback.dne: That's a Do Not Enter sign. The speed limit is the white sign with a number. Try again.
feedback.curve: That warns of a curve. The speed limit is the white sign with a number. Try again.
feedback.default: The speed limit is the white rectangle with a number. Try again.
